headline: Is Kroger (KR) Pricing Reflect Its Valuation After Strong Multi Year Share Price Gains
summary: If you are wondering whether Kroger's current share price reflects its true value, this article will walk you through what the numbers are really saying about the stock. Kroger's shares last closed at US$75.60, with returns of 2.0% over 7 days, 10.1% over 30 days, 20.1% year to date, 18.5% over 1 year, 72.7% over 3 years and 137.5% over 5 years that many investors will want to put into context. Recent news around Kroger has focused on its role as a major US grocery retailer, including...
